name: Texas Pecan Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together grated cheddar cheese and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, melt butter and mix in flour, paprika, and half of the pecans.
3. Combine the cheese mixture with the flour mixture until well blended.
4. Form the dough into small balls.
5. Press a thumb imprint into each ball and insert a pecan half.
6. Place the formed cheese balls on a baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Serve hot.
